samples.title: Butter Chicken
steps: Melt chocolate chips in a heavy saucepan over low heat
Add sweetened condensed milk to a bottom of saucepan
Stir constantly
Reduce heat to a simmer and cook for 10 minutes
Remove from heat
Stir in chocolate chips
Pour into a lightly greased 13x9-inch baking dish
Chill until firm
Process chips in a blender until smooth. <

Beat eggs; add remaining ingredients

Pour into 9 x 13-inch pan
Bake at 350 for 30 minutes

samples.title: Butter Chicken
steps: Season the chicken with salt and pepper
Melt the butter in a skillet
Add the chicken, turning once, until golden brown
Turn and cook until the juices are no longer pink, about 10 minutes
Remove the chicken from the skillet
Add the remaining butter to the pan and simmer, the pan, for 2 minutes
Reduce heat

samples.title: Butter Chicken
steps: Place the chicken in a shallow bowl
Season the chicken with the garlic, salt, and pepper
Place the chicken in the bowl
Pour the lemon juice on the chicken
Cover and refrigerate for 2-3 hours
Remove the chicken from the marinade
Place the chicken in a large shallow dish
Add them
